name: Machine Learning
description: Algorithms that learn from and make decisions based on data.

body.raw: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. Topics include supervised, unsupervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation.
body.html: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. Topics include supervised, unsupervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation.
